summary: Replayed ADR 0194 from merged `origin/main`, reconverged the dedicated Coolify guest plus shared edge publication, refreshed the live edge certificate coverage for the Coolify hostnames, and re-verified the governed repo deployment path end to end from the latest mainline candidate.

verification.observed: `uv run --with pytest --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python -m pytest tests/test_coolify_playbook.py tests/test_coolify_runtime_role.py tests/test_coolify_tool.py tests/test_generate_platform_vars.py tests/test_nginx_edge_publication_role.py tests/test_lv3_cli.py tests/test_service_topology_filters.py tests/test_subdomain_catalog.py tests/test_subdomain_exposure_audit.py tests/test_edge_publication_playbooks.py -q` passed with `98 passed in 2.45s` after aligning the authenticated-edge expectations with the ADR 0197 mainline merge.

`make converge-coolify` completed successfully from merged `origin/main` commit `093af353` with `coolify-lv3 ok=115 changed=7 failed=0`, `nginx-lv3 ok=71 changed=5 failed=0`, and `proxmox-host ok=43 changed=5 failed=0`.

verification.check: Private controller registration and auth artifacts
verification.observed: `python3 scripts/coolify_tool.py whoami` reported controller URL `http://100.64.0.1:8012`, public URL `https://coolify.example.com`, apps URL `https://apps.example.com`, version `4.0.0-beta.470`, team `Root Team`, and local server `coolify-lv3` as reachable plus usable.

`python3 scripts/coolify_tool.py deploy-repo --repo https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify-examples --branch main --base-directory /static --app-name repo-smoke --build-pack static --subdomain repo-smoke --wait --timeout 900` finished successfully with deployment `klmsg3ybgvp7xwnk8op3cdlp` for application `r4z9zeqpci7uykiw3bj08hrf`.

Direct probes against `203.0.113.1` using `--resolve` returned `302` for `https://coolify.example.com/`, `200` for `https://repo-smoke.apps.example.com/`, and `404` for `https://apps.example.com/` while no apex app is assigned. Fetching `https://repo-smoke.apps.example.com/` returned the expected Coolify example page content beginning with `Laravel Meetup` and `It works. Really? But for real?`.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards`, `bash -n scripts/validate_repo.sh`, `python3 scripts/generate_status_docs.py --check`, `python3 scripts/generate_diagrams.py --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/validate_repository_data_models.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml python scripts/subdomain_exposure_audit.py --check-registry`, `uv run --with jsonschema python scripts/generate_dependency_diagram.py --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python scripts/platform_manifest.py --check`, and `git diff --check` all passed on the merged-main candidate.

notes: This mainline receipt supersedes the branch-local `2026-03-28-adr-0194-coolify-paas-deploy-from-repo-live-apply` receipt as the canonical platform-version bump evidence and records the final merged-main replay from commit `093af353`.

The merged-main replay preserved the replay-safety fixes added after the first workstream apply: explicit platform vars loading in `playbooks/coolify.yml` and topology-independent URL defaults in `coolify_runtime`.
The wildcard application lane is verified through `repo-smoke.apps.example.com`; `apps.example.com` intentionally remains `404` until an apex application is assigned.
